title: Nuggets Repair Items
description: You can use nuggets to repair items.
body:
You can use original nuggets and nuggets of other mods to repair items.
### The initial repair requires 1 experience. For every 9 additional nuggets, the required experience increases by 1.
### So, the required experience = the integer part of (number of nuggets / 9) + 1
![Anvil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a2894921e4c079321018c80e8d00af905f10cd5.png)
